con:mockResponse.name: ServerError
con:mockResponse.con:responseContent: <soap:Envelope xmlns:soap="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/envelope/" xmlns:doc="http://example.com/products"> <soap:Header/> <soap:Body> <soap:Fault> <faultcode>soap:Server</faultcode> <faultstring>Internal Server Error</faultstring> <detail> <doc:UploadDocumentResponse> <doc:success>false</doc:success> <doc:message>Error processing document upload</doc:message> <doc:status>ERROR</doc:status> <doc:responseCode>500</doc:responseCode> <doc:errorCode>ERR-500</doc:errorCode> <doc:errorMessage>Failed to process the upload request</doc:errorMessage> <doc:requestId>req-error-001</doc:requestId> <doc:sourceSystem>ms-products-mock</doc:sourceSystem> </doc:UploadDocumentResponse> </detail> </soap:Fault> </soap:Body> </soap:Envelope>

con:mockResponse.name: Timeout
con:mockResponse.con:responseContent: <soap:Envelope xmlns:soap="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/envelope/" xmlns:doc="http://example.com/products"> <soap:Header/> <soap:Body> <soap:Fault> <faultcode>soap:Server</faultcode> <faultstring>Gateway Timeout</faultstring> <detail> <doc:UploadDocumentResponse> <doc:success>false</doc:success> <doc:message>Request processing timeout</doc:message> <doc:status>TIMEOUT</doc:status> <doc:responseCode>504</doc:responseCode> <doc:errorCode>ERR-504</doc:errorCode> <doc:errorMessage>The request timed out after 10 seconds</doc:errorMessage> <doc:requestId>req-timeout-001</doc:requestId> <doc:sourceSystem>ms-products-mock</doc:sourceSystem> </doc:UploadDocumentResponse> </detail> </soap:Fault> </soap:Body> </soap:Envelope>
